channel.title: maggieboodles TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from maggieboodles

item.title: thank you @Chez Vous for having me!! stylist: Dee Toh, associate director of Chez Vous Private Space service: Korean Filler Perm
item.description: thank you @Chez Vous for having me!! stylist: Dee Toh, associate director of Chez Vous Private Space service: Korean Filler Perm
item.author: maggieboodles

item.title: new daily bike??? #italjet #italjetdragster
item.description: new daily bike??? #italjet #italjetdragster
item.author: maggieboodles

item.title: 2b scooty gang @clairey @Nino , waiting for u @tgsx
item.description: 2b scooty gang @clairey @Nino , waiting for u @tgsx
item.author: maggieboodles

item.title: here’s what i love about the Dragster200 • aggressive, futuristic design • ⁠minimal and sharp brake lights • ⁠full led head lights and dynamic flow led indicators • ⁠trellis frame • ⁠brembo calipers from the factory overall giving it a clean, race inspire
item.description: here’s what i love about the Dragster200 • aggressive, futuristic design • ⁠minimal and sharp brake lights • ⁠full led head lights and dynamic flow led indicators • ⁠trellis frame • ⁠brembo calipers from the factory overall giving it a clean, race inspire
item.author: maggieboodles

item.title: Riding to work - here’s my 2 week update!
item.description: Riding to work - here’s my 2 week update!
item.author: maggieboodles

item.title: in partnership with Italjet this SG60, we’ve got an exclusive deal just for you! with every Italjet purchase, enjoy a complimentary front and rear dash cam (worth $268+) installation included. while stocks last. DM me to find out more! 🙂 #italjet #italjet
item.description: in partnership with Italjet this SG60, we’ve got an exclusive deal just for you! with every Italjet purchase, enjoy a complimentary front and rear dash cam (worth $268+) installation included. while stocks last. DM me to find out more! 🙂 #italjet #italjet
item.author: maggieboodles

item.title: first inspection w the gsxr 🙂
item.description: first inspection w the gsxr 🙂
item.author: maggieboodles

item.title: riding for 4.5 years and fetched my first pillion today, what a milestone 🏍️✨ @tgsx
item.description: riding for 4.5 years and fetched my first pillion today, what a milestone 🏍️✨ @tgsx
item.author: maggieboodles

item.title: i think he wouldn’t have stopped if i didn’t honk 🫠
item.description: i think he wouldn’t have stopped if i didn’t honk 🫠
item.author: maggieboodles

item.title: really nice to meet friendly riders on the road once in awhile!! :)
item.description: really nice to meet friendly riders on the road once in awhile!! :)
item.author: maggieboodles

item.description: rainy day things

item.title: my morning riding routine to work
item.description: my morning riding routine to work
item.author: maggieboodles

item.title: really appreciate it when drivers actually check their blind spot and signal early before changing lanes. thank you for seeing & looking out for us bikers out there 🥹
item.description: really appreciate it when drivers actually check their blind spot and signal early before changing lanes. thank you for seeing & looking out for us bikers out there 🥹
item.author: maggieboodles

item.title: watch till the end and tell me if the view was worth it
item.description: watch till the end and tell me if the view was worth it
item.author: maggieboodles

item.title: day 1 of National Biker's Weekend done! tomorrow's your final chance to enjoy $800 off Italjet scooters plus a FREE Arai helmet with every purchase. don't miss out and see you at Italjet's booth! #nationalbikersweekend2025 #italjet
item.description: day 1 of National Biker's Weekend done! tomorrow's your final chance to enjoy $800 off Italjet scooters plus a FREE Arai helmet with every purchase. don't miss out and see you at Italjet's booth! #nationalbikersweekend2025 #italjet
item.author: maggieboodles

item.title: new bike?? 😮‍💨
item.description: new bike?? 😮‍💨
item.author: maggieboodles

item.title: not going to let any minor inconveniences affect my day
item.description: not going to let any minor inconveniences affect my day
item.author: maggieboodles

item.title: can’t believe i made it from singapore to thailand w my bike 🇸🇬🇹🇭
item.description: can’t believe i made it from singapore to thailand w my bike 🇸🇬🇹🇭
item.author: maggieboodles

item.title: “let’s ride up from singapore to bangkok”. an adventure of a lifetime #bangkok #hatyai #hatyaiflood @tgsx
item.description: “let’s ride up from singapore to bangkok”. an adventure of a lifetime #bangkok #hatyai #hatyaiflood @tgsx
item.author: maggieboodles

item.title: all in the same morning?? 😭
item.description: all in the same morning?? 😭
item.author: maggieboodles

item.title: posting this before the year ends, never thought I’d ride to bangkok, and definitely didn’t have “being a “refugee” in Hatyai” on my 2025 bingo list got stuck during the flood and ALMOST had no access to food, water, or electricity. slept at a petrol stat
item.description: posting this before the year ends, never thought I’d ride to bangkok, and definitely didn’t have “being a “refugee” in Hatyai” on my 2025 bingo list got stuck during the flood and ALMOST had no access to food, water, or electricity. slept at a petrol stat
item.author: maggieboodles

item.title: short Christmas ride w Tippie Toes Club 🏍️🎀
item.description: short Christmas ride w Tippie Toes Club 🏍️🎀
item.author: maggieboodles

item.title: which year was your favorite? don’t need a new bike for 2025 when my gsxr is an all rounder - sports, touring, off roading, submarine 😮‍💨
item.description: which year was your favorite? don’t need a new bike for 2025 when my gsxr is an all rounder - sports, touring, off roading, submarine 😮‍💨
item.author: maggieboodles

item.title: grateful for the brands, companies and friends i’ve made 🫶🏻 hope i didn’t miss anyone 🤞🏻

item.title: Replying to @AA thank u all for helping me to search my phone, u know who u r 😙😙
